---
title: "Literature review data cleaning"
output: html_notebook
---


```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
data_raw <- read.csv("2026_chapter1_rawdata.csv")

View(data_raw)

metric_cols <- c("accuracy", "precision", "recall", "map", "f1")

performance_means <- sapply(data_raw[metric_cols], mean, na.rm = TRUE)

performance_maxs <- c(
  accuracy = 100,
  precision = 1,
  recall = 1,
  map = 1,
  f1 = 1
)
```

```{r}
data_std <- data_raw %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(metric_cols),
      ~ (.x - performance_means[cur_column()]) / (performance_maxs[cur_column()] - performance_means[cur_column()]),
      .names = "{.col}_std"
    )
  )

data_mean_std <- data_std %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    PAA = mean(c_across(ends_with("_std")), na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

data_paa <- data_mean_std %>%
  select(-all_of(metric_cols), -ends_with("_std"))

saveRDS(data_paa, "data_paa.rds")
```
